creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
(In reply to Piotr Kubaj from comment #4)

Something went wrong, ustring.cpp is 472 lines and the error says line 805. The ifdef in the patch should hide the erring enum lines if the llvm libcpp is not used. It looks like the #endif is being added too early.

The pull request is made against master, while the patch I added here is against 2.0.11 - they have different line numbers.
